tools.name: btc_price
tools.description: Get the current Bitcoin price in USD and major fiat currencies. Source: mempool.space. Real-time.

tools.name: btc_send_decision
tools.description: Returns a composited send-or-wait recommendation for a Bitcoin transaction. Fetches live mempool and fee data, then outputs a machine-actionable verdict (SEND_NOW, WAIT, or URGENT_ONLY) with fee rates in sat/vB, mempool pressure level, and estimated savings if you wait. Ideal for agents that need a

tools.name: lightning_address_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a Lightning Address (user@domain.com) to a payable BOLT11 invoice for a given amount. Handles the full LNURL-pay protocol internally. Returns the invoice plus min/max sendable amounts for validation.

tools.name: tx_decode_explain
tools.description: Fetch a Bitcoin transaction by txid and return a structured, agent-ready summary: type (P2WPKH/P2TR/P2SH/etc.), input/output counts, fees, fee rate in sat/vB, confirmation status, RBF flag, SegWit/Taproot flags, and a one-line agent_summary string ready for LLM context injection. Saves 500-2000 toke

tools.name: optimal_send_window
tools.description: Bitcoin transaction timing intelligence. Returns a congestion forecast for the next 1-4h, a recommended UTC send window when fees are projected at/below your target, a fee trajectory (rising/stable/falling) with a calibrated confidence score, next-block minimum fee, confirmation targets for 3/6/144

tools.name: json_validate
tools.description: Validate JSON, identify its root type, and return normalized JSON plus a SHA-256 content hash.

tools.name: json_extract
tools.description: Extract one value from JSON using a simple dot path with array indexes, for example users[0].email.

tools.name: csv_to_json
tools.description: Convert CSV, TSV, semicolon, or pipe-delimited text into structured JSON with bounded row output.

tools.name: text_analyze
tools.description: Return deterministic text statistics, estimated tokens, reading time, and a SHA-256 content hash.

tools.name: hash_generate
tools.description: Generate a SHA-256 or SHA-512 digest in hexadecimal or Base64 form.

tools.name: base64_convert
tools.description: Encode UTF-8 text to Base64 or decode Base64 safely, with standard and URL-safe alphabets.

tools.name: timestamp_convert
tools.description: Convert Unix seconds, Unix milliseconds, RFC3339, or ISO dates into normalized UTC timestamp forms.

tools.name: uuid_generate
tools.description: Generate one to one hundred cryptographically random RFC 4122 UUID version 4 identifiers.

tools.name: url_parse
tools.description: Parse an HTTP or HTTPS URL into normalized scheme, host, port, path, query, and fragment fields without fetching it.

tools.name: jwt_decode
tools.description: Decode JWT header and payload claims locally without verifying the signature. The response always marks verification as false.
